description: Style NoteLet your little one enjoy the summer with this cute little slip-ons from footfun. Their soft and bendable outsole lets your child stay on their feet all day long.Product Details Red round toed slip-ons with forefoot strapBranding on forefoot strap, heel and outsolePrinted footbed adhered to outsoleRaised TPU outsole with horizontal groovesMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
